characters.name: 希尔曼
characters.appearance: middle-aged man with broad shoulders and defined muscles, short black hair with streaks of gray, stern eyes, numerous scars on his bare torso from blades and swords

characters.name: 哈德利
characters.appearance: young blond boy around six years old, large curious eyes, small frame, wearing simple cloth training clothes

locations.name: 乌山镇训练场
locations.description: open outdoor training ground surrounded by wooden fences and distant mountains, early morning light casting soft golden hues, rows of children standing in formation on grassy earth

scenes.narration: 清晨，阳光洒落，一群孩子站在训练场上，准备开始一天的锻炼。
scenes.visual_prompt: wide shot of a group of children standing in rows on a grassy field at sunrise, silhouetted by golden morning light, an older man stands before them with hands behind his back

scenes.narration: 护卫队队长希尔曼冷冷扫视着孩子们，话语中透着严厉与期望。
scenes.visual_prompt: medium close-up of Hilman speaking sternly, his sharp gaze scanning the northern group of young children, early sunlight highlighting his strong facial features

scenes.narration: 孩子们屏息凝神，不敢发出一点声音，生怕惹怒这位严厉的教官。
scenes.visual_prompt: low angle shot of young children looking up nervously, their wide eyes fixed on Hilman, slight morning breeze ruffling their hair

scenes.narration: 希尔曼强调，他们虽是平民，但唯有刻苦锻炼，才能赢得尊重。
scenes.visual_prompt: medium shot of Hilman gesturing firmly while addressing the crowd, older boys showing determined expressions, soft daylight illuminating the training ground

scenes.narration: 孩子们齐声回应，声音响亮，充满稚嫩却坚定的决心。
scenes.visual_prompt: wide shot of all children shouting in unison, arms stiff at their sides, dust lightly rising from the ground beneath their feet in the morning glow

scenes.narration: 希尔曼讲解‘蕴气式’要领，教导孩子们如何凝聚身体潜力。
scenes.visual_prompt: medium shot of Hilman demonstrating the 'Yunqi Stance'—feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, hands at waist level, calm expression under gentle sunlight

scenes.narration: 一两百名孩子整齐摆出姿势，努力模仿着最基础的锻炼动作。
scenes.visual_prompt: aerial view of dozens of children arranged in neat rows, all mimicking the stance, some wobbling slightly, soft mist lingering over the grass

scenes.narration: 年长的孩子稳如磐石，而年幼的则站得歪歪扭扭，尚显吃力。
scenes.visual_prompt: split screen: left shows older boys standing firm with steady breathing; right shows younger kids trembling, legs uneven, struggling to maintain balance

scenes.narration: 希尔曼走向年幼的孩子们，其他教官接手其余队伍。
scenes.visual_prompt: medium shot of Hilman walking toward the northern group of young children, two other instructors stepping forward to monitor the central and southern teams

scenes.narration: 金发少年哈德利低声惊呼：大魔头来了！孩子们瞬间紧张起来。
scenes.visual_prompt: close-up of young Hadley whispering with wide eyes, then quickly snapping back to attention as Hilman approaches the group

scenes.narration: 希尔曼脱去背心，露出布满伤痕的肌肉，孩子们眼中闪烁着崇拜的光芒。
scenes.visual_prompt: slow zoom-in on Hilman removing his vest, revealing scarred torso under warm morning light, young children staring in awe

scenes.narration: 刀剑伤痕是男人的勋章，希尔曼的身影在孩子们心中化作英雄的象征。
scenes.visual_prompt: low angle shot of children gazing up at Hilman's scarred body, sunlight framing him like a hero, silent admiration in their eyes
